case_title: ROBERT BIGGS VS. SUSAN SWETLAND et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BIGGS, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT SWETLAND, SUSAN FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANTY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED MAY-16-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SWETLAND, SUSAN
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIGGS, ROBERT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-19-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER SC 150 REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANTY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2013 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR $55.00 - SERVED APR-24-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANTY, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANTY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR UNTIMELY SERVICE ON DEFENDANT SUSANA SWETLAND TO JUL-01-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT SUSAN SWETLAND. DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE CO.WAS REPRESENTED BY RAYMOND PULMANO--CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIGGS, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWETLAND, SUSAN FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANTY, INC. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,180.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. BOTH (2) DEFENDANT WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STEPHEN WALLACE--CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR BIGGS, ROBERT ASSIGNED TO QUAN, HENDSON
